name: Ring King
description: Ring King is a 2D, side-view fighting game centered around professional wrestling. The player controls a wrestler with the goal of defeating a series of opponents to become the world champion. Each wrestler has a unique set of moves consisting of punches, kicks, grapples, throws, and special moves. The game features a stamina system that depletes as the wrestler performs actions; running out of stamina leaves the wrestler vulnerable. Matches take place in a wrestling ring with ropes that can be used to the player's advantage for attacks and escapes. Successfully executing moves builds up a special meter that, when full, allows the wrestler to perform a powerful finishing move. The core gameplay loop involves maneuvering around the ring, executing a variety of offensive and defensive maneuvers, and strategically managing stamina to gain an advantage over the opponent. Winning matches earns the player points, which are used to improve the wrestler's attributes such as strength, speed, and stamina.

controls.space: Perform special move (when meter is full)
